examples: The Washington Post reported, one of the main reasons, experts say, is that farmers have used herbicides on the milkweed plants that these butterflies feed on.
Caterpillars of monarch butterflies feed exclusively on milkweed leaves.
Maize pollen is dispersed by the wind and often blows onto milkweed plants that grow near maize fields.
The monarchs feed on milkweed plants, which thrive in "edge habitats" -- the areas where forested land and farm fields meet.
So now, I spend a large portions of my free time watching praying mantids molt, hummingbirds catch gnats over the compost pile, monarch caterpillars munch away the milkweed.
